Package org.apache.tiles.web.startup

Class TilesListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.tiles.web.startup.AbstractTilesListener
      • org.apache.tiles.web.startup.TilesListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EventListener, javax.servlet.ServletContextListener
    public class TilesListener
extends AbstractTilesListener
    Deprecated.
    Please extend AbstractTilesListener.
    Listener for the initialization of the Tiles container.
    Version:

      • createTilesInitializer

        protected org.apache.tiles.startup.TilesInitializer createTilesInitializer()
        Deprecated.
        Creates a new instance of BasicTilesInitializer. Override it to use a different initializer.
        Specified by:
        createTilesInitializer in class AbstractTilesListener
        Returns:
        The Tiles servlet-based initializer.
        Since:
        2.1.2

      • createContainer

        protected org.apache.tiles.TilesContainer createContainer​(javax.servlet.ServletContext context)
        Deprecated.
        Extend BasicTilesInitializer.
        Creates a Tiles container.
        Parameters:
        context - The servlet context to use.
        Returns:
        The created container.
